safe_claims: The listed scenarios ran in a disclosed dedicated headless Chromium session.
The recorded actions, screenshots, DOM, accessibility, console, network, viewport, state, and image comparisons exist for the listed URLs only.
must_not_claim: Authenticated, private-account, cookie, CAPTCHA, broad-search, stealth, cross-browser, or unlisted-route behavior was verified.
